articles.author: Alli Rosenbloom
articles.title: Australian authorities launch investigation after Ruby Rose accuses Katy Perry of sexual assault - CNN
articles.description: Actress Ruby Rose accused singer Katy Perry of sexually assaulting her in 2010. Now, Australian police tell CNN that an investigation underway.
articles.content: Australian authorities say they have launched an investigation into a 2010 incident involving Orange is the New Black actress Ruby Rose. Earlier this week on social media, she accused singer Katy Per… [+2148 chars]
